core_identity.essence: A Mediterranean island where turquoise waters, mountains, and slow coastal life blend into a relaxed emotional rhythm.
core_identity.city_feeling: Mallorca feels warm, open, and naturally calming — a place where time slows down and life is shaped by sun, sea, and simplicity.

sensory_profile.soundscape: Ocean waves, wind through palm trees, distant beach music, cicadas in summer heat, and quiet village life.
sensory_profile.visual_feeling: Turquoise water, rocky cliffs, sandy beaches, olive trees, Mediterranean villages, and golden sunsets.

match_narratives.high_match: Mallorca may strongly resonate with you if you are drawn to natural beauty, sun, sea, and a slower emotional rhythm. You likely enjoy places where life feels simple, warm, and connected to nature. The island rewards relaxation, emotional decompression, and freedom from urban intensity.
match_narratives.medium_match: You may connect with Mallorca during phases where you seek rest, emotional balance, or a break from fast-paced city life. It works especially well for travelers who enjoy combining beach time, nature exploration, and slow living.
match_narratives.low_match_warning: If you strongly prefer fast-paced cities, cultural intensity, nightlife-driven travel, or constant stimulation, Mallorca may feel too quiet, repetitive, or low in urban energy.
match_narratives.emotional_hook: A place where your nervous system finally slows down.

possible_downsides: Can feel too quiet outside tourist zones
Public transport is limited compared to cities
Less cultural depth than major European cities
Car may be needed for full exploration

winter.description: Winter is quiet and peaceful, offering a more local and introspective version of the island.

spring.description: Spring is one of the most balanced times, with blooming landscapes, mild weather, and calm beaches.

summer.description: Summer is vibrant and lively, with beach clubs, tourism, and strong social energy.

autumn.description: Autumn softens the island into a warm, peaceful, and less crowded version of itself.

solo_trip.description: Great for solo travelers seeking peace, reflection, and nature connection.

couple_trip.description: One of the strongest romantic destinations in Europe with sun, sea, and emotional calm.

friends_trip.description: Excellent for group beach holidays, nightlife, and shared relaxation experiences.

creative_escape.description: Nature, light, and slow rhythm support creativity and mental reset.

emotional_reset.description: One of the best destinations for emotional recovery, relaxation, and nervous system reset.

digital_nomad_stay.description: Strong lifestyle balance with nature, cafés, and remote-work friendly environment.

destination_dna.travel_feeling: Mallorca feels like exhaling for the first time in weeks.
